Latest.description:
Fixed:
 - Deathlink not working

NOTE: If you are upgrading from 0.0.2 you will need a new YAML and a new SAVE file! Do not ask for support with sync issues if the game was NOT started while using v0.3. You will also need to remove the "{Cyberpunk Install Dir}\archive\pc\mod\CyberpunkArchipelagoMod.archive" file from your game as it contains broken quest progression.

New:
Bi-directional Progression Sync
Enforced progression blocking via District travel restrictions and required items added to the multi-world
YAML options added to control how many quests you want to include as checks

Improvements:
Lifepath choices have been consolidated into 1 check.
Point of no return (post Nocturne Op55N1) quests have been consolidated into 1 ending check.
Removed:

Quest blockers for all quests were removed from the mod due to causing hard locks even after getting the requisite item to progress
Latest.title: Cyberpunk Archipelago Mod V0.3 Hotfix 3

v0.0.2.description:
**New**
Quickhacks have been turned into "Progression Items" to make it much easier for it to be balanced in bigger sessions.
Added Tarot Locations
Added Gig Locations
Added Minor Quest Locations
Added Contract Locations

**Fixes**
Item's unable to be placed on Cyberpsycho Sightings
v0.0.2.title: Cyberpunk Archipelago Mod V0.0.2
